message:
fix: sidebar ESC closes overlays behind it, agent selector renders behind sidebar (#7641)

Two fixes:
1. Pressing ESC when MissionBrowser or MissionControlDialog is open from
   the sidebar closed both the overlay and the sidebar. The sidebar's ESC
   handler now skips when showBrowser or showMissionControl is true.
2. AgentSelector dropdown used z-floating (250) but the sidebar uses
   z-modal (400), so the dropdown rendered behind it. Promote to z-modal.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
